testcase.name: verifyAllContentSections
testcase.system-out: [BeforeSuite] Chrome binary ready. Section verified: From today's featured article Section verified: Did you know Section verified: In the news Section verified: On this day All content sections verified correctly.

testcase.name: quickVerificationOfMultipleMediaWikiSites
testcase.system-out:
=== Quick verification of all sites === ✓ Wikipedia: MediaWiki detected ✓ Wikimedia Commons: MediaWiki detected ✓ Wikidata: MediaWiki detected ✓ Wikivoyage: MediaWiki detected ✓ Wiktionary: MediaWiki detected ✓ MediaWiki: MediaWiki detected ✓ Wikiversity: MediaWiki detected ✓ Wikinews: MediaWiki detected
=== SUMMARY === Sites verified: 8 MediaWiki sites confirmed: 8 Success rate: 100.0%

testcase.name: verifyMediaWikiSiteStructureAndLinks[Wikipedia, https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page](1)
testcase.system-out:
=== Verifying: Wikipedia === Page title: Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia Generator: MediaWiki 1.46.0-wmf.19 ✓ Main navigation visible ✓ Main content visible Internal links with text found: 221 Link #1: "Main Page" → https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page Link #2: "Talk" → https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Talk:Main_Page Link #3: "Read" → https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page Link #4: "Wikipedia" → https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia Link #5: "free" → https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Free_content ✓ Footer with MediaWiki link found
✓ Wikipedia verified successfully

testcase.name: verifyMediaWikiSiteStructureAndLinks[Wikinews, https://en.wikinews.org/wiki/Main_Page](8)
testcase.system-out:
=== Verifying: Wikinews === Page title: Wikinews, the free news source Generator: MediaWiki 1.46.0-wmf.19 ✓ Main navigation visible ✓ Main content visible Internal links with text found: 161 Link #1: "Main Page" → https://en.wikinews.org/wiki/Main_Page Link #2: "Collaboration" → https://en.wikinews.org/wiki/Talk:Main_Page Link #3: "Read" → https://en.wikinews.org/wiki/Main_Page Link #4: "you can write!" → https://en.wikinews.org/wiki/Wikinews:Introduction Link #5: "UTC" → https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Coordinated_Universal_Time ✓ Footer with MediaWiki link found
✓ Wikinews verified successfully
testcase.system-err: Mar 14, 2026 3:29:00 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 14, 2026 3:29:00 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.80. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.16.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: completeDonationFlowValidation
testcase.system-out: Starting complete donation flow test... ✓ Step 1: Amount selected ✓ Step 2: Form remains visible ✓ Step 3: Next step/submit button available: "Donate by direct debit (SEPA)" Donation flow validation complete (stopped before payment)

testcase.name: verifyCurrencyIsSetToEUR
